scripts.config:cache: npm.cmd config set cache "./.npm-cache" --location=project && cd frontend && npm.cmd config set cache "../.npm-cache" --location=project && cd ../server && npm.cmd config set cache "../.npm-cache" --location=project && cd ..
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd run config:cache && npm.cmd run install:server && npm.cmd run install:frontend
scripts.dev: echo 请分别在两个终端运行 npm.cmd run dev:server 和 npm.cmd run dev:frontend
